scripts.docker:reset: docker-compose down -v && docker system prune -a --volumes -f && docker-compose build --no-cache && docker-compose up
scripts.docker:restart: docker-compose down -v && docker-compose up -d && echo '⏳ Aguardando banco subir...' && timeout /t 15 /nobreak && echo '🚀 Executando migrações...' && curl http://localhost:3000/api/migrate
scripts.docker:full-reset: docker-compose down -v && docker system prune -a --volumes -f && docker-compose build --no-cache && docker-compose up -d && echo '⏳ Aguardando banco subir...' && timeout /t 20 /nobreak && echo '🚀 Executando migrações...' && curl http://localhost:3000/api/migrate
